calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-062 Phase 1 substrate-readiness refresh (one-hot head input UC6)
items.note: arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-A refresh after GAP-B option-2 one-hot head input (2026-05-17). UC1-UC5 same as 542 + UC6 first_action_onehot wiring. Diagnostic only. Local smoke 6/6 PASS; validate_experiments OK.

items.title: Goal-seeding pipeline diagnostic: drive_floor x transient patches (post EXQ-588 autopsy)
items.note: Diagnostic (claim_ids=[]). 3 arms: ARM_OFF (floor=0, no patch), ARM_FLOOR (0.9, no patch), ARM_FLOOR_PATCH (0.9 + transient benefit 3.0). Persistent agent, 300 ep x 200 steps, post-warmup=ep50. A1 OFF zero seedings; A2 floor >=2/3 seeds seeding; A3 floor+patch >=2/3; A4 patch contacts >1.1x floor. Routes failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-588. Smoke PASS; validate_experiments OK.

items.title: EXQ-ISEF-005: 4-phase infant curriculum vs flat parameter baselines (GAP-14)
items.note: infant_substrate:GAP-14 closure. PASS confirms ARC-046 (phased residue accumulation via curriculum); unblocks DEV-NEED-008.

items.title: GAP-11 pilot: committed-mode curriculum harness validation (EXP-0157)
items.note: commitment_closure:GAP-11 diagnostic pilot. 3 arms: EMERGENT (P0 warmup on easy env -> P2 eval on target), FORCED_RV (clone + forced rv=0.001 -> P2), STARVED (tight threshold=1e-4 -> abort gate fires at mid-probe). C1: emergent committed steps/ep>100 in >=2/3 seeds. C2: forced-rv committed steps/ep>100 all seeds. C3: starved arm aborts (abort_reason=commitment_not_elicited) all seeds. PASS unblocks V3-EXQ-460b/463b/464b/466b/467b/468b OCD battery. Supersedes V3-EXQ-461 (synthetic scripted diagnostic, 2026-05-12).

items.title: MECH-204 closure: sleep cluster + StepHarness integration validation
items.note: Closure-handoff contributory evidence for substrate_ready MECH-204. 2-arm step {0.0, 0.25} with use_sleep_aggregation_cluster + StepHarness waking + anchor install (581 pattern). C1 MECH-204 fires; C2 cluster SWS/replay live post-anchor; C3 rv divergence >=3% vs off. confirms 541c (does not supersede). validate_experiments OK; dry-run smoke exit 0 (aggregate FAIL on 1 seed expected). Behavioral proxy V3-EXQ-593 remains deferred until ARC-065/MECH-269.

items.title: Post-SP-CEM three-arm ARC-033 vs ARC-058 harm-trunk arbitration (self_attribution:GAP-1)
items.note: self_attribution:GAP-1 evidence. OFF vs ON_INDEPENDENT (ARC-033) vs ON_SHARED (ARC-058); main-path SP-CEM defaults (ARC-065). PASS requires C0 policy entropy>=0.10, C1 balanced agent/body harm tags in P2, C2 harm_a_forward_r2>=0.3 both ON arms, C3 cross-arm r2 discrimination (not bit-identical). Supersedes inconclusive 445/445b monostrategy reads and two-arm 445h. validate_experiments OK; dry-run smoke exit 0 (criteria FAIL on tiny run expected).

items.title: MECH-258 precision-weighted PE vs raw magnitude (post-SP-CEM revalidation)
items.note: self_attribution MECH-258 closure. 2 arms: PE_FORWARD (E2+dACC) vs RAW_NORM_ABLATION (dACC only, ||z|| fallback). Main-path SP-CEM defaults. C0 entropy>=0.10, C1 harm_a_forward_r2>=0.3, C2 corr(bias,model_pe)>corr(bias,raw)+0.05 in >=2/3 seeds. validate_experiments OK; dry-run smoke exit 0.
